comment: Systemd service enable/disable manifest for Sigil OS
notes: hostapd and dnsmasq are unmasked but DISABLED — wifi-fallback controls them
NetworkManager is enabled; dhcpcd should have wlan0 in denyinterfaces
bluetooth-panel requires /etc/sigil/panel.env (created by firstboot or flasher)
audio-manager, radio-fetcher and audio-player are the production autonomous playback runtime
radio-stream remains installed but disabled as an explicit rollback path
